_doc: 🆕 [H.4 / Sir 2026-05-28 16:00 真痛 image 1 anchor] AutoArbiter concern 两层耦合 vocab.
concern = Jarvis 视角的 'I'm watching this for Sir', e.g.
what_i_watch: 'Sir 面试准备进度 / 焦虑情绪'
Sir 真意 image 1 严格把关 — concern propose 多是 jarvis Reflector 想象:
强 ACT: Sir 真意支持 (Sir 真抱怨此 topic / Sir 亲口加)
强 REJ: watch trivial / why 缺 (jarvis 自嗨 propose)
强 ACT 信号 (任 1 hit → bypass LLM 直 activate):
(b) STM Sir 抱怨 vocab 命中 + what_i_watch token overlap ≥ min
(Sir 真在 worry 此 concern, 不是 jarvis 自嗨)
强 REJ 信号 (任 1 hit → bypass LLM 直 reject):
注: dedup 已 ConcernsLedger.propose 做, 不重做
准则 6 持久化, Sir CLI scripts/auto_arbiter_concern_vocab_dump.py 可改.

_doc_config: sir_complaint_keywords: Sir STM 含此 keyword → 复述 watch 视为 Sir 真意 ACT
trusted_sources: source 命中 → 直 ACT (Sir 亲口加)
min_watch_token_overlap: Sir 抱怨 vs watch 词级 overlap ≥ N 才 ACT
min_watch_words: what_i_watch 词数 < N → 直 REJ
min_why_words: why_i_care 词数 < N → 直 REJ (缺 rationale)
